sourceRefs: DRAFT — built to the unit-03 template (objectif fonctionnel + Point Langue grammar + thematic lexicon + DELF-format comprehension), then self-audited before commit. Awaiting native-speaker review.

Progression blueprint: Alter Ego+ A1 (Hachette), Dossier 9 'Et après ?' / la vie en commun (il faut + infinitif, l'interdiction, l'impératif). Content is original; the book is used only for scope/sequence, never copied.
